images.quality_assessment: Strong visual asset foundation with 32 total images, but quality concerns exist. alt_texts list contains only 20 descriptive alt texts despite 32 images. Many alt texts are repetitive (multiple variations of 'Colon Hydrotherapy') and several reference unrelated services (Cryotherapy, VelaShape, Hypnosis) suggesting possible template or cross-deal contamination. Relevant primary and treatment imagery present but navigation could confuse buyers with irrelevant competitor service images.

reviews.text: I was nervous at first but it turned out really well and relaxing. I got to know D.House a little more during the session while also learning about the body. Flushing this waste out felt wonderful I’m a very gassy person who does mild poops and never feels empty after SO I shall see how this changes that . Read More

reviews.text: I have bad gastro issues, my gastro doctor at the VA recommended this (they dont provided services). After one session. My stomach didnt hurt I feel relief. I got the colon hydrotherapy with lymphatic massage. The process was great. I felt some tenderness from the massage, but worth it. I'm getting the package for more sessions. Deborah was amazing. I highly recommend her and colon therapy if you
